title: 若駒ステークスの後に・三冠へ！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After showing off her skills in the Wakagoma
Stakes, Tokai Teio gleefully boasts about how
much she stood out.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the warm-up round complete, she looks next
to the first of the Classics, where the top racers of
a generation prove their worth: the Satsuki Sho!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio's quest to become a Triple Crown
champion just like Symboli Rudolf starts now!
